response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains; his C++ exposure is minimal and outdated (NI LabWindows), while his career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile projects unrelated to financial systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web technologies
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and developer tooling
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows in last 10+ years
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or enterprise databases
